required_action_terms: source coupled to canonical Higgs radial mode
required_certificates: canonical Higgs operator certificate with non-shortcut reference and allowed kind
same-source sector-overlap certificate with non-shortcut reference and allowed kind
W/Z correlator mass-fit path certificate with non-shortcut reference and allowed kind
required_observables: W/Z two-point correlators under source shifts
same-source top/WZ covariance surface in later measurement rows

required_top_level.source_coordinate: same scalar source coordinate used by top FH/LSZ

actual_current_surface_status: open / same-source EW action certificate absent
exact_next_action: Supply a real same-source EW action certificate satisfying this schema, then implement W/Z correlator mass-fit rows or source-Higgs C_sH/C_HH rows with identity certificates.

parent_statuses.canonical_higgs_operator_realization_gat: open / canonical-Higgs operator realization gate not passed
parent_statuses.same_source_sector_overlap_identity: exact negative boundary / same-source sector-overlap identity obstruction
parent_statuses.same_source_wz_response_certificate_gate: open / same-source WZ response certificate gate not passed
parent_statuses.source_higgs_gram_purity_gate: open / source-Higgs Gram purity gate not passed
parent_statuses.wz_correlator_mass_fit_path_gate: exact negative boundary / WZ correlator mass-fit path absent on PR230 surface
parent_statuses.wz_response_harness_implementation_plan: bounded-support / WZ response harness implementation plan

proposal_allowed_reason: This builder validates an action-surface prerequisite only; it does not authorize retained/proposed-retained y_t wording.

shortcut_rejections.candidate: EW gauge-mass diagonalization after H is supplied
shortcut_rejections.rejection: static dM_W/dh is not a same-source lattice dM_W/ds measurement
structural gauge support is not a production EW gauge/Higgs action block
the harness guards W/Z rows as absent and has no dynamic EW fields
instrumentation is default-off and lacks accepted O_H identity/normalization

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not synthesize EW action data or W/Z rows
does not treat static EW algebra as a same-source measurement
does not define O_H by fiat
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
verdict: No same-source EW action certificate is present.  Current PR #230 still has static EW gauge-mass algebra and structural gauge support, but no dynamic SU(2)xU(1)/Higgs action block with the same scalar source coordinate used by the top FH/LSZ measurement.
